entry.title: Wuthering Waves Version 3.5 Update Maintenance Notice
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

To bring you exciting new content and a better gaming experience, we will soon perform update maintenance for Version 3.5 "Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns".

You will be temporarily unable to log into the game during the maintenance. Please plan your gaming time accordingly. As this update requires a large download, we recommend updating the game while connected to a Wi-Fi network. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and thank you for your understanding.

[Maintenance Time & Compensation]

✦Maintenance Duration: 2026-07-10 04:00 - 2026-07-10 11:00 (UTC+8)

✦Maintenance Compensation: Astrite ×300, Crystal Solvent ×2

✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail function before 2026-07-10 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation mail is valid until the update maintenance for the next version begins.

Maintenance duration may be extended depending on the actual progress. The development team will provide follow-up announcements and adjust compensation accordingly.

[How to Update]

Once the update maintenance begins, you can update your client using the following methods:

✦PC: Close the game, restart the launcher, and click Update.

✦Android: Launch the game and follow the in-game pop-up instructions to update.

✦iOS: Go to the App Store to download/update.

✦Mac: Go to the App Store to download/update.

✦PS5™: Go to the PS5 home screen, select Wuthering Waves, press the OPTIONS button, and select Check for Update.

[Pre-download Details]

✦Pre-download Start Time: 2026-07-08 10:00 (UTC+8)

[Pre-download Space Requirements]

✦PC: 76GB

✦Android: 29GB

✦iOS: 29GB

※Special Notice: Version 3.5 uses resource compression technology to update existing files in the client, so this pre-download is noticeably larger and requires more free storage than recent updates. This is a one-time adjustment; pre-download sizes are expected to return to normal starting with the next update. We apologize for the inconvenience this may cause Rovers in the meantime, and thank you for your continued support and understanding of Wuthering Waves.

※Please note that you will not be able to pre-download if you do not have enough reserved storage space.

※To ensure there is sufficient storage space for resource integration during the update maintenance, a certain amount of space must be reserved (PC: 76GB | Android/iOS: 13GB). Therefore, the actual download size for this pre-download is (PC: 52GB | Android/iOS: 16GB). After the update maintenance is complete, the extra space used for the resources merging process will be automatically freed up.

[How to Pre-download]

✦PC: When pre-download for the latest version becomes available, "New Version Pre-download" appears below the "Start" button on the launcher interface. Select this option to pre-download the resources.

✦Android/iOS: When pre-download for the latest version becomes available, press the "Pre-download" button, either on the title screen after a successful login or on the in-game Terminal page, and confirm to pre-download the resources.

You can continue playing the game while the pre-downloading process is ongoing. The process can be paused at any time. Whether it is complete or not, the update maintenance will speed up to a certain degree when initiated.

Please ensure that a stable network connection during the pre-downloading process.

[Version 3.5 Content Preview]

[New Resonators]

5-Star Resonator: Yangyang: Xuanling (Havoc/Sword)

※Available from the [Voices on Azure Feathers] Featured Resonator Convene.

5-Star Resonator: Suisui (Glacio/Rectifier)

※Available from the [Blessings From Dewy Winds] Featured Resonator Convene.

New Rover Attribute: Rover (Electro)

※Complete Main Quest Chapter IV Act II "Xuanling Sings, Storm Quelled" to unlock.

[New Weapons]

5-Star Weapon: Azure Oath (Sword)

※Available from the [Azure Oath] Featured Weapon Convene.

5-Star Weapon: Firstlight's Herald (Rectifier)

※Available from the [Firstlight's Herald] Featured Weapon Convene.

[New Region]

Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang

This region includes the following areas: Xuanfang Hold, Eastern Xuan Peaks, Western Fang Peaks, and Southern Yuan Hills.

※Follow the guidance of Main Quest Chapter IV Act I "The Wind Before the Storm" to access this region.

[New Echoes]

Myriad Snare: Rustfire Chassis, Thousand-Puppet Pavilion, Fog Lionarch, Forbidden Bastion, Kernel Puppet: Joy, Kernel Puppet: Anger, Kernel Puppet: Worry, Kernel Puppet: Reflection, Kernel Puppet: Grief, Kernel Puppet: Fright, Fog Lionarch: Body, Fog Lionarch: Head, Smiter, Smolder, Porcelain Picket, Stone Picket, and Aureate Picket

Added Sonata Effects: Lamp of Nether Road (5pcs Set), Heart of Evil's Purge (5pcs Set), and Song of Feathered Trace (5pcs Set)

Added Tacet Fields: Western Fang Peaks Tacet Field and Eastern Xuan Peaks Tacet Field

Added Tacet Discord Nest: Southern Yuan Hills Tacet Discord Nest

[New Story]

Main Quest Chapter IV: Act I "The Wind Before the Storm"

Main Quest Chapter IV: Act II "Xuanling Sings, Storm Quelled"

Main Quest Chapter IV: Segue "The Chant of Unseen Ties"

Exploration Quest: "Code Red: Corehazard"

Exploration Quest: "Faithful Heart Tested at Skyfall"

Exploration Quest: "Autopuppets in Fog Veiled Chambers"

[Feature Optimizations]

Added the Pioneer Experience feature, which integrates previous story fast track features and adds "Next Stop: Mengzhou"

Added the Resonator Voice Pack Customization feature

Added the Bioprint feature

Optimized the display effects of the Echo Gallery and Enemies, adding dynamic breathing animations

Optimized the Story Auto-Play feature

Optimized the Guidebook feature

[Other Optimizations]

Optimized the model appearance of Rover

Added resource compression technology on PC to reduce storage space usage

Added [XeSS 3] frame generation support on PC

Optimized the Resource Cleanup feature on mobile devices

[New Challenges]

Tactical Hologram: Sparring Challenge: Denia

The second cycle of Endstate Matrix is open: Version 3.5 - Version 3.8

[Other New Content]

[Expedition Motorbike Chassis] Cloud Ride

[Weapon Projection] Projection: Blade of a Thousand Arts

[Titles] "Virtual Beacon" and "Until We Meet Again"

[Sigils] "Space and Blake Bloom Medal," "Past the Endstate: Adversity Vanguard," and "Xuanfang Wonder"

[Avatars] Space and Blake Bloom

[New Store Arrivals]

[Outfits] Deluxe Outfit: Lynae - Peppermint and Deluxe Outfit: Chisa - Peach Parfait

[Accessories] Yangyang: Xuanling - Cloud Lark and Suisui - Upon Rosy Clouds

[Expedition Motorbike Model] Nightveil Piercer Premium Model

[Special Events]

[A Glimpse of Xuanfang] Area Exploration Event

[Shape of Yesterday] Photo Collection Event

[Lament Recon: Tacet Crisis] Combat Event

[Recaptured: Action Highlights] Combat Photography Event

[Lollo Campaign: New Journey] Featured Commission Event

[Virtual Crisis: Quadrant Trials] Crisis Trial Challenge Event

[Gifts of Aftertune] 7-Day Login Event

[H5 Web Events]

In Search of Lost Jade Web Event

※For more details regarding the new version update, system optimizations, and bug fixes, please stay tuned for the upcoming Version 3.5 Content Details.

[Device Requirements]

To ensure a smooth installation and gaming experience, we recommend that Rovers refer to the following system requirements:

  1. Minimum Requirements

Android: OS version 7.0 or above, Snapdragon 835, MediaTek G71/72 or equivalent processor, 4 GB RAM or more

iOS: OS version 14 or above; iPhone 11 or later, iPad with A13 or equivalent processor, 4 GB RAM or more

Mac: macOS version 12.0 or above, M1 or later model, 16 GB RAM or more

PC: [OS] Windows 10 64-bit, [CPU] Intel i5 (9th Gen)/Ryzen 2700, [Graphics] GTX 1060/RX 570/Intel Arc A380, [RAM] 16 GB or more

  1. Recommended Requirements

Android: OS version 7.0 or above, Snapdragon 8 Gen 1+/Gen 2/Gen 3 or equivalent MediaTek processor, 6 GB RAM or more

iOS: OS version 15 or above; iPhone 13 or later, iPad with A15 or equivalent processor, 6 GB RAM or more

Mac: macOS version 15.0 or above, M3 or later model, 16 GB RAM or more

PC: [OS] Windows 10 64-bit, [CPU] Intel i7 (9th Gen)/Ryzen 3700, [Graphics] RTX 2060/RX 5700XT/Intel Arc A750, [RAM] 16 GB or more

  1. Storage Requirements

Android/iOS: 60 GB

Mac: 155 GB

PC: 115 GB (SSD recommended for installation)

PS5™: Please ensure you have sufficient storage space to complete the update.

  1. Controller Support

Mobile devices support the following controllers:

Wireless connection: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualShock®4, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Mac devices support the following controllers:

Wired/Wireless connection: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualShock®4, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

PC devices support the following controllers:

Wired/Wireless connection: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Wired connection: DualShock®4

When connecting other controllers that support multiple input modes to a PC, we recommend adjusting their settings to Xinput mode for the best experience.

entry.title: Post-Lament Anthropocene: Enemies — Collection of Small & Medium Size Echoes in Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang
entry.content:
Post-Lament Anthropocene: Enemies — Collection of Small & Medium Size Echoes in Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang

The Autopuppet spends year after year patrolling these halls, purging the Tacet Discords and any lingering threats left within, maintaining peace in Xuanfang.

entry.title: "Nightveil Piercer" Premium Model Set Bundle
entry.content:
"A spirit bird whose cry heralds the dawn; a morning star that lights the dark night."

The "Nightveil Piercer" Motorbike Premium Model will go live after the Version 3.5 update. Take a look at its details.

How to Obtain

After the Version 3.5 update, the "Nightveil Piercer" Premium Model Set Bundle will be permanently available in the Vehicle Looks Store. The Bundle includes "Nightveil Piercer" Premium Model x1 and Astrite x600, priced at 29.99 USD.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves - XBOX Game Pass Gift Pack & XBOX Exclusive Sigil
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

Starting with Wuthering Waves Version 3.5, XBOX Game Pass members can claim exclusive in-game rewards!

  • Version 3.5 will be released on July 10th, 2026 (UTC+8).

Rewards

XBOX Game Pass Gift Pack (Once per Version):

Morphable Echo x2, Premium Tuner x10, Shell Credit x30,000

XBOX Exclusive Sigil: "Paths and Possibilities" (One-Time Reward):

An exclusive Sigil available only to XBOX Game Pass members. Once claimed, it will be permanently added to your account.

How to Claim

XBOX Game Pass Gift Pack:

After each version update, XBOX Game Pass members can log in to the XBOX Series X|S or XBOX PC version of Wuthering Waves and claim the Gift Pack via in-game mail.

XBOX Exclusive Sigil:

After updating to Version 3.5, XBOX Game Pass members can log in to the XBOX Series X|S or XBOX PC version of Wuthering Waves and claim the exclusive Sigil via in-game mail. This is a one-time reward.

Notes

You must reach Union Level 2 and unlock the Mail feature to claim these rewards.

Each UID can claim one XBOX Game Pass Gift Pack per version.

Each UID can obtain the XBOX Exclusive Sigil only once. It cannot be claimed again.

Reward delivery may be delayed in some cases. If you do not receive the rewards, please try logging in again later.

If you have any questions, please contact our official customer support.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Version Preview | Version 3.5 "Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns"
entry.content:
Wuthering Waves Version Preview | Version 3.5 "Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns" Scheduled for Release on July 10 (UTC+8)

The Preview Special Broadcast has concluded. Take a look back at all these exciting updates

entry.title: Resonator Review | Feathered Tempest — Cartethyia
entry.content: Cartethyia, the wandering knight who travels across Rinascita. Formerly known as the Blessed Maiden, the vessel of Divinity, and the Queen of Gale and Tide, she went by the name Fleurdelys. Now, she is simply a free and unfettered wandering knight.

entry.title: Upcoming Events in Wuthering Waves Version 3.4
entry.content: Here is a compilation of the upcoming events in Version 3.4. Don't miss out!

entry.title: [Version 3.4 Featured Resonator/Weapon Convene: Phase II]
entry.content:
[Dance in the Storm's Wake] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Cartethyia, 4-Star Resonators: Yangyang, Yuanwu, and Mortefi receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-06-18 10:00 - 2026-07-09 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

- Reach Union Level 5.

- Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

- Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

- [Dance in the Storm's Wake] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

- The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

- Featured Resonator Cartethyia is exclusive to the [Dance in the Storm's Wake] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

- Featured Resonator Cartethyia's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

- During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

※For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Defier's Thorn] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Defier's Thorn, 4-Star Weapons: Endless Collapse, Marcato, and Amity Accord receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-06-18 10:00 - 2026-07-09 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

- Reach Union Level 5.

- Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

- Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

- [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

- Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

- The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

- The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Defier's Thorn.

- Featured Weapon Defier's Thorn is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

※For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: Version 3.4 Wuthering Waves Wallpaper
entry.content:
"Yeah... Think I... Think I had a dream."

"...Can't remember, it's kinda fuzzy."

"But it was a good dream... That I know."

entry.title: Wuthering Waves × Cyberpunk: Edgerunners | New Enemy — Nightmare: Adam Smasher
entry.content: A Nightmare Tacet Discord that is hunting down Lucy. The data torrent that plates its body scrambles local detection and offers immunity to most attacks from Resonators.

entry.title: [Freeze Frame] Featured Weapon Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Freeze Frame, 4-Star Weapons: Relativistic Jet, Cadenza, and Fusion Accretion receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-06-13 10:00 - 2026-07-09 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Freeze Frame.

  • Featured Weapon Freeze Frame is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [Tomorrow in the Frame] Featured Resonator Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Lucilla, 4-Star Resonators: Lumi, Youhu, and Taoqi receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-06-13 10:00 - 2026-07-09 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Tomorrow in the Frame] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Lucilla is exclusive to the [Tomorrow in the Frame] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Lucilla's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: V3.4 Discord Quest Social Plan
entry.content:
Dear Rover,

WuWa&Edgerunners Discord Quest Event has begun. Click the link below to complete the quest on Discord and get a chance to win Discord Orbs!

<https://canary.discord.com/quests/1509838468124115004>

Event Duration

2026/06/09 ~ 2026/06/23 (PT)

Rewards

Discord Orbs* 700

Who is Eligible

Available to players on PC where both Discord and Wuthering Waves are available. Discord’s premium services are restricted in some regions.

Other Terms

Limit of one reward redemption per account. For more information on Discord Quests, please visit Discord Quest Help Center.

How to Participate

In order to successfully complete the WuWa&Edgerunners Quest, you will need to play the game for 15 minutes. You must be logged into the Discord desktop app to track your progress.

The reward will be automatically added to your Discord account once you claim it after completing the quest.

Discord Quest FAQ

Q: Is there a limit on how many Quests I can redeem on my Discord account?

A: Eligible users can redeem one of each of the available Quest campaigns on their Discord account.

For more information on Discord Quests, visit our Discord Quest Help Center.

Q: Is this feature/promotion available in my region?

A: Some Quests will not be available in all regions based on terms and conditions. If you are in an ineligible region for a Quest, you will not be able to complete it.

Additionally, Discord’s premium services are restricted in some regions. If you are unable to access the Gift Inventory, you are not eligible for Quests.

Q: I have concerns or questions regarding privacy and Quests.

A: We encourage you to review Discord’s Privacy Policy for further details about how we use your information. You can head over to our Data Used for In-Game Rewards article, to learn more about how we use data for Quests.

Q: Why am I unable to complete Quest while using Linux?

A: Currently, Quest rewards are unable to be earned on Linux devices.

However, Discord team is looking into a resolution for this issue so that earning Quest rewards is possible on Linux in the future. For now, we recommend completing the requirement on a different operating system, like Windows or MacOS.

Discord support team does not have an exact ETA for when a solution will be available, and won't be able to provide any status updates on this specific issue.

Q: I no longer see a Quest. Where did it go?

A: Quests are typically only available for a limited amount of time. If you no longer see a Quest in the Quest Home or in-app notifications about the quest, the period to complete and claim the reward for the Quest is over.

entry.title: Profile Reveal | Memory Palace - Lucilla
entry.content:
Loading Data>>>

Lucilla

Lucilla, President of Startorch Academy and idealist with both feet on the ground. She holds quiet vigil over her students as they rise to challenge the very sky.

entry.title: [Skull Thrasher] Collab Weapon Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Skull Thrasher, 4-Star Weapons: Relativistic Jet, Cadenza, and Fusion Accretion receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.4 Update - 2026-07-09 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation - Skull Thrasher] is a [Collab Weapon Convene] event of the [At Dream's Edge] collab campaign. Use [Shadowforge Tide] to Convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The Guarantee count is shared across all [Collab Weapon Convene] events under the same collab campaign. If a 5-Star Weapon is not obtained, the attempt is counted towards the Guarantee, which is carried over [Collab Weapon Convene] events under the same campaign and resets when a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • In Collab Resonator Convene and Collab Weapon Convene of the same collab campaign, you receive [Illusive Coral] instead of [Afterglow Coral] upon obtaining 5-Star or 4-Star Resonators/Weapons. The Collab Convene rules differ from the Featured Convene rules to some degree; please refer to the in-game Convene page for details.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Skull Thrasher.

  • Featured Weapon Skull Thrasher is exclusive to the Collab Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • During the event, your Collab Resonator Convene and Collab Weapon Convene attempts are tallied. When the tally reaches specific milestones, you can claim the corresponding rewards in Sweetdream Tuning. Please refer to the announcement regarding Sweetdream Tuning.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [Rekindled Embers of Rage] Collab Resonator Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Rebecca, 4-Star Resonators: Lumi, Youhu, and Taoqi receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.4 Update - 2026-07-09 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Rekindled Embers of Rage] is a [Collab Resonator Convene] event of the [At Dream's Edge] collab campaign. Use [Dreamcatcher Tide] to Convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The Guarantee count is shared across [Collab Resonator Convene] events of the same collab campaign. If a 5-Star Resonator is not obtained, the attempt is counted towards the Guarantee, which is carried over across all [Collab Resonator Convene] events of the same collab campaign and resets once a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • In Collab Resonator Convene and Collab Weapon Convene of the same collab campaign, you receive [Illusive Coral] instead of [Afterglow Coral] upon obtaining 5-Star or 4-Star Resonators/Weapons. The Collab Convene rules differ from the Featured Convene rules to some degree; please refer to the in-game Convene page for details.

  • Featured Resonator Rebecca is exclusive to the [Rekindled Embers of Rage] Collab Resonator Convene and the [Instant Flashlight] Collab Special Login Event, and will not be available by other means once the events end. Rebecca's Waveband will not be made available in Item Exchange. You can obtain Rebecca's Waveband by opening At Dream's Edge - Waveband.

  • During the event, Resonator Rebecca will become available in the Resonator Trial event. Please refer to the [Night City Roaming] Featured Collab Event for details. Complete the challenge with a team that includes Rebecca to claim rewards.

  • During the event, your Collab Resonator Convene and Collab Weapon Convene attempts are tallied. When the tally reaches specific milestones, you can claim the corresponding rewards in Sweetdream Tuning. Please refer to the announcement regarding Sweetdream Tuning.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [Spectral Trigger] Collab Weapon Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Spectral Trigger, 4-Star Weapons: Relativistic Jet, Cadenza, and Fusion Accretion receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.4 Update - 2026-07-09 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation - Spectral Trigger] is a [Collab Weapon Convene] event of the [At Dream's Edge] collab campaign. Use [Shadowforge Tide] to Convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The Guarantee count is shared across all [Collab Weapon Convene] events under the same collab campaign. If a 5-Star Weapon is not obtained, the attempt is counted towards the Guarantee, which is carried over [Collab Weapon Convene] events under the same campaign and resets when a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • In Collab Resonator Convene and Collab Weapon Convene of the same collab campaign, you receive [Illusive Coral] instead of [Afterglow Coral] upon obtaining 5-Star or 4-Star Resonators/Weapons. The Collab Convene rules differ from the Featured Convene rules to some degree; please refer to the in-game Convene page for details.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Spectral Trigger.

  • Featured Weapon Spectral Trigger is exclusive to the Collab Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • During the event, your Collab Resonator Convene and Collab Weapon Convene attempts are tallied. When the tally reaches specific milestones, you can claim the corresponding rewards in Sweetdream Tuning. Please refer to the announcement regarding Sweetdream Tuning.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [Dreaming Upon the Moon] Collab Resonator Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Lucy, 4-Star Resonators: Lumi, Youhu, and Taoqi receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.4 Update - 2026-07-09 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Dreaming Upon the Moon] is a [Collab Resonator Convene] event of the [At Dream's Edge] collab campaign. Use [Dreamcatcher Tide] to Convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The Guarantee count is shared across [Collab Resonator Convene] events of the same collab campaign. If a 5-Star Resonator is not obtained, the attempt is counted towards the Guarantee, which is carried over across all [Collab Resonator Convene] events of the same collab campaign and resets once a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • In Collab Resonator Convene and Collab Weapon Convene of the same collab campaign, you receive [Illusive Coral] instead of [Afterglow Coral] upon obtaining 5-Star or 4-Star Resonators/Weapons. The Collab Convene rules differ from the Featured Convene rules to some degree; please refer to the in-game Convene page for details.

  • Featured Resonator Lucy is exclusive to the [Dreaming Upon the Moon] Collab Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends. Lucy's Waveband will not be made available in Item Exchange. You can obtain Lucy's Waveband by opening At Dream's Edge - Waveband.

  • During the event, Resonator Lucy will become available in the Resonator Trial event. Please refer to the [Night City Roaming] Featured Collab Event for details. Complete the challenge with a team that includes Lucy to claim rewards.

  • During the event, your Collab Resonator Convene and Collab Weapon Convene attempts are tallied. When the tally reaches specific milestones, you can claim the corresponding rewards in Sweetdream Tuning. Please refer to the announcement regarding Sweetdream Tuning.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: Post-Lament Anthropocene: Stars Intertwined | Lucilla
entry.content: "Lucilla, President of Startorch Academy. What surprises do you have in store for me today?"—Lucilla

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event Winners Reveal
entry.content:
Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event "Reverbs from the End of Galaxies" has concluded, and we want to express our heartfelt appreciation to all participants for their dedication and creativity in our fan art event. Let's view the winning entries and their contributors!

1st Place

@ErikVarts

Aquaz Nattaree

@jinzzaanim

@yoshi_houndbell

@mieumiso

2nd Place

@Ronaldeweeb17

@shahoshii

@Coco_Sakeko

@Rave_1875

@HanasawaHsu

3rd Place

@chaochaochun

@dekr_jan

@X0cious

@butyou_net

@nareunhao

@pehiyope_gaucxi

@Angelo2602_

@Nick_____123

@ooC1iD7XwimLOou

@maltie00
